entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The legume species used in the study, specifically desi and kabuli types

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINE
entities.description: A population derived from a cross between desi and kabuli chickpea types

entities.name: PATANCHERU, INDIA
entities.description: The location of ICRISAT from which the experimental material was received

entities.name: SEHORE, BHOPAL, INDIA
entities.description: The location where the experiment was conducted at Rafi Ahmed Kidwai College of Agriculture

entities.name: RABI SEASON
entities.description: The winter cropping season during 2011-12 and 2012-13

entities.name: DAYS TO 50% FLOWERING
entities.description: The number of days taken for 50% of the plants to flower

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: The stage at which the crop reaches full development

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical measurement of the plant

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL YIELD
entities.description: The total biomass produced by the plant

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: The weight of seeds produced per unit area

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of seed yield to biological yield

entities.name: STANDARD STATISTICAL ANALYSIS
entities.description: The approach used to calculate genetic variability, heritability, and genetic advance

entities.name: GENETIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: The diversity in genotypes within the population

entities.name: HERITABILITY
entities.description: The proportion of phenotypic variation due to genetic factors

entities.name: GENETIC ADVANCE
entities.description: The expected gain in a trait after selection

entities.name: ADDITIVE GENE EFFECTS
entities.description: The cumulative effect of individual alleles on a trait
